title: Blade KD
description: This resource pack replaces the diamond sword with a black and purple sword.
body:
This resource pack makes a diamond sword into a black and purple sword.

**What a beauty....** Download Beautiful sun: [Realistic sun and moon KD](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/km-moon-and-sun)
